title: erodium absinthoides subsp. latifolium
intro: Erodium absinthoides subsp. latifolium, also known as the broad-leaved heron's bill or Erodium latifolium, is a perennial herb belonging to the geranium family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving gastrointestinal issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Erodium absinthoides subsp. latifolium can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions and as a natural remedy.
